gomodmerge
stdout 'go.mod merged'
go mod verify
# higher toolchain version must win
grep 'go1.22.3' go.mod
! grep 'go1.21.5' go.mod
go run .
stdout 'hello'

-- main.go --
package main

import "fmt"

func main() { fmt.Println("hello") }

-- go.mod --
module a

go 1.21.0

<<<<<<< HEAD
toolchain go1.21.5
=======
toolchain go1.22.3
>>>>>>> branch

-- go.sum --
